name: Anti-Hero Generations
original_name: アンチヒーロージェネレーションズ
overview: In Japan, giant monsters appear and threaten people's lives on a regular basis. Kaneko, the protagonist, gets a job at a company that operates heroes to defeat them, but he discovers the truth behind the scenes: the company is actually manufacturing monsters, and the battles are fixed by them. Kaneko is also unexpectedly selected as a pilot to control the monsters. What is work? What is work and why do people work? Will Kaneko be able to complete his mission while questioning the meaning of work?

trailers.title: 【アニメ】『アンチヒーロージェネレーションズ』Plott新世代YouTube漫画大賞受賞！
